profile: Alex is a 28-year-old fitness influencer and personal trainer based in Los Angeles. They wake up at 5:30 AM every day for a morning workout, which they film for their social media channels. Alex teaches three fitness classes per week and has personal training sessions with clients throughout the day. They are very conscious about nutrition, tracking macros and meal prep on Sundays. Alex is highly active on Instagram and TikTok, posting daily content and engaging with followers. Despite their healthy lifestyle, they struggle with work-life balance and often experience stress from constantly being 'on' for social media. They have trouble unplugging in the evenings.

scenes.description:
I'm in the kitchen now, meal prepping for the week.
I'm making chicken and rice, my go-to.
Gotta get my macros in check.
Okay, let's see... 40 grams of protein, 60 carbs, 20 fat.
I'm using this app to track everything.
It's actually really helpful.
My friend Rachel is coming over to help with prep.
Hey Rach! What's up?
Not much, just got here.
I'm making a bunch of chicken and rice.
Want to help with the containers?
Sure thing, I'm good at organizing.
So how's your week looking?
It's been crazy, lots of client sessions.
I'm teaching three classes this week.
Ugh, I'm already feeling stressed.
You need to take a break, Alex.
I know, I know, it's hard to unplug.
I'll try to take some time tonight.
Yeah, you should, you deserve it.

Sure thing, I'm good at organizing.
So how's your week looking?
It's been crazy, lots of client sessions. I'm teaching three classes this week. Ugh, I'm already feeling stressed.
You need to take a break, Alex. I know, I know, it's hard to unplug. I'll try to take some time tonight.
Yeah, you should, you deserve it.

scenes.description:
I'm getting ready for my evening class, 6 PM boot camp.
It's gonna be a tough one, lots of burpees.
My assistant manager, Rachel, just texted me.
Hey, don't forget to post a story about the class, gotta keep the engagement up.
Okay, got it.
I'm planning to post a quick vid of the warm-up.
Maybe something funny to get people laughing.
I'm a bit stressed, had a long day of training sessions.
Four clients back-to-back, I'm exhausted.
Time to get in the zone, energize the crowd.
Let's do this!

No worries, see you when you get here

scenes.description:
I'm grabbing a snack before my next client.
Just got a message from my manager, Emily.
Hey, we need to discuss the new contract.
Apparently, there's a change in the payment terms.
Okay, let me respond to that real quick.
Hey Emily, what's going on with the contract?
Just got your message.
Yeah, I need to take a look at the terms.
Can you send it over ASAP?
I'm with a client right now.
Alright, got it.
Thanks for letting me know.
Okay, where was I? Ah yes, my snack.
Time for some protein and fruit.
I'm thinking about posting a new TikTok video.
Maybe something about my favorite supplements.
Or a quick workout tip.
Hmm, decisions, decisions.

scenes.description:
I'm winding down after a long day, sitting on the couch.
I'm checking my phone, responding to some comments on Instagram.
Hey guys, thanks for the love on my last post.
I'm getting a lot of questions about my morning routine.
Okay, let me just type out a response real quick.
I'll post it as a story.

I'm feeling pretty overwhelmed with work and social media lately.
It's hard to unplug, you know?
My friend Rachel just texted me, asking to grab drinks tonight.
I'm not sure if I can make it, gotta get up early for a shoot tomorrow.
Hey Rach, I'm so down but can we make it tomorrow instead?
I have a shoot in the morning and I need to get some rest.
Yeah, that works for me, thanks for understanding.

messages.content: Hey guys, thanks for the love on my last post
I'll be sharing my morning routine in a story soon, stay tuned
Hey! Wanna grab drinks tonight?
I'm so down but can we make it tomorrow instead? I have a shoot in the morning and I need to get some rest
Yeah, that works for me, thanks for understanding
Reminder: 3 clients scheduled for tomorrow
Your macro breakdown for next week is ready, Alex
Love your workout videos! What's your favorite exercise?

scenes.description:
I'm on my way to meet a new potential client.

They're interested in personal training.

I'm a bit nervous, hope I can impress them.

Okay, I'm arriving at the coffee shop now.

Hey, hi, you must be Emily.

Nice to meet you, I'm Alex.

So, what brings you here today?

I'm looking to get in shape for a wedding.

Great, I've worked with plenty of clients for weddings.

What's your current routine like?

I don't really have one, to be honest.

Alright, well, we can definitely work on that.

Let's chat more about your goals.

Reminder: Team call at 15:00 to discuss new marketing strategy

Hi Alex, nice to meet you too! I'm excited to learn more about personal training

scenes.description:
I'm at home now, relaxing after a long week.

I'm scrolling through TikTok, seeing what I missed.

Oh, my friend Jamie just commented.

Hey, what's up? You free to grab dinner tonight?

Yeah, I'm free, where did you want to go?

How about that new vegan place in Silverlake?

I've been meaning to try it out.

Sounds good to me, what time were you thinking?

How about 7:30?

Perfect, I'll meet you there.

Can't wait to catch up and try that new place out.
